description: Virtualized pagination keeps rows=800 char-burst responsive with page-windowed projection and scroll-safe selection retention

description: Virtualized pagination keeps rows=800 char-burst correct with immediate virtualized text repair and page-windowed rendering

promotion.label: exploratory
reasons: Logged keep is exploratory until repeat, holdout, breadth, or promotion-gate metadata is recorded.

asi.evidence: benchmark-lint and focused Playwright pass after immediate virtualized repair; load 561.6ms, scroll 357ms, p95 typing 11.6ms, chars_correct=1, failed=0
